name: IMDB List Injector
description: Save IMDB lists, export them as CSV/JSON/Markdown/text, and project them as a full-screen cinematic slideshow.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://image.tmdb.org; connect-src https://www.imdb.com https://api.themoviedb.org; object-src 'none';
